description: You are an instructional coordinator preparing for a STEM curriculum review. Research education standards from four authoritative sources: Next Generation Science Standards (nextgenscience.org), Common Core (corestandards.org), ISTE Standards (iste.org), and National Center for Education Statistics (nces.ed.gov). Organize these sources into a collection named 'STEM Standards Review' and synthesize your findings into a reference document at /home/ga/Desktop/stem_standards_reference.txt. The document must include a section for each organization with its URL and a brief description of its coverage.

metadata.occupation_context: Instructional Coordinator - curriculum standards research and organization
